opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My legs broke out overnight in hundreds of painful, itchy whiteheads after I shaved, and I am terrified it is a serious infection.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: After shaving my legs I broke out in itchy sore pustules and I'm worried it's a bad infection.

symptom_narrative.onset: 24 hours ago after shaving the legs and wearing tight leggings
symptom_narrative.character: multiple small follicle-centred pustules on a red base, mildly itchy/tender
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: lots of sore itchy whiteheads, anxious
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: a hair visible in the centre of each spot, some crusted after popping; NO fever/chills, no large deep painful lumps, no hot spreading red patch, no red streaking

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: applied over the rash, seemed worse

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; shaving + tight clothing + occlusive moisturiser

objective_data_offered.value: many small follicle-centred pustules on red bases over the shaved lower legs, some crusted, skin between them normal, visible on video
no fever, no big deep painful lumps, no hot spreading redness or red streaks
